title: Default's TBS Addons
description: Adds alot of stupid stuff related to the broken script to your world!!
body:
This mod can CRASH your game and BAN you from your world, PLAY AT YOUR OWN RISK. [Some versions are safe as it says in their version description!!]

This mod is a mod that adds new stuff for the mod: the broken script!!

There are 3 entities, 1 as a boss you need to fight, lore to uncover, events and structures that can randomly spawn!!

What are some of the entities/structures/blablabla?
<details>
<summary>SPOILERS</summary>

# ENTITIES
  
-Startification [The one who started it all, can ban you from your world and crash your game, likes to disguise as a cow.]
  
-Hopelesssoul [Once a player, now just stares at you from far away, getting close will result in him disapearing or interfering his chase.]

-Kiki [Just a regular cat.. Or is she? Can only be spawned by breaking the awakened cat block, super fast and does ALOT of damage, like ALOT. Gives a cat ingot from drop that can be used with a stick and 2 cat ingots to create a powerful weapon.]

# EVENTS

[There are atleast a bit of events so I'll only mention a few]

-Lightning [Summons lightning on you]

-Player joined the game [Fake joined message, enables other events, bypasses tick freeze]

-Theres also events for spawning the other entities except Kiki.

# STRUCTURES

[Most structures only appear when generating your world, some may spawn in the new dimension too.]

-Spread [Protected void block with a sign above it saying spread]

-NullifiedThing [A star like shape of nullified blocks, stepping on them teleports you to the protected void dimension]

-HouseRuins [A ruined version of a normal protected void house, only spawns in the protected void dimension. Mostly made of partially corrupted protected void blocks and a sign on the wall.]


</details>

# FAQ

Q: How do you disable banning and crashing?
A: Sadly you can't right now, soon I'll make a version that doesn't do that.

Q: Will you make support for 1.20.1 too?
A: Soon, I'll try to.

Install this if you like horror mods and stuff :D

Can you find everything this mod has to offer..?
